MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER 1040 ASHBURY STREET BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC.'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS and COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AND DAMAGES.

APPEARANCES: John P. Baba, Esq. of Wiegel Law Group, PLC 552-8230 for petitioner & moving party; Wayne K. Snodgrass, Deputy City Atty 554-4675 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion. Petitioner to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

PETITIONER BAYCHESTER SHOPPING CENTER, INC. NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS AND COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AND DAMAGES.
